title: PSWM-Fix (Deprecated)
description: Does nothing anymore (used to fix bugs in Parzi's Star Wars Mod)
body:
<font size="6" color="red">This mod is deprecated, please use the base mod updates instead</font>

<s>This mod fixes a few issues in [Parzi's Star Wars Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parzis-star-wars-mod)


Currently those are:


 * Make Kyber crystal ore drop crystals. Until now, PSWM was missing a way for getting the crystals out of lighsaber crystal ores. This enforced you to use creative mode to get lightsaber crystals for building a lightsaber. With this fix, you can get them from the ore.

 * Make focusing crystal ore drop focusing crystals.

 * Make NPCs unbreakable. Previously, NPCs could be destroyed with explosions.


Please note that this **requires** the [original mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parzis-star-wars-mod), and is only an addon for it!</s>
